entries.title: Federal Reserve Issues Final Rule on Capital Requirements for Large Banks
entries.raw_content: The Federal Reserve Board on Monday issued a final rule that revises the capital framework for large banking organizations. The rule implements the Basel III endgame requirements and is effective January 1, 2027. Institutions with total assets of $100 billion or more are subject to the new requirements.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Requests Comment on Proposed Rule Amending Regulation Z
entries.raw_content: The Federal Reserve Board is requesting public comment on a proposed rule that would amend Regulation Z (Truth in Lending) to update disclosure requirements for adjustable-rate mortgages. Comments are due 60 days after publication in the Federal Register.

entries.title: Supervisory Guidance on Management of Interest Rate Risk
entries.raw_content: The federal banking agencies are issuing supervisory guidance to remind institutions of sound practices for managing interest rate risk. This guidance applies to all FDIC-supervised institutions and is effective immediately.

entries.title: Enforcement Action: Consent Order Issued to First Community Bank
entries.raw_content: The Federal Reserve Board has issued a consent order to First Community Bank requiring corrective action for violations of the Bank Secrecy Act. The bank has agreed to enhance its AML compliance program and pay a civil money penalty of $1.2 million.
